title: calonyction campanulatum
intro: Calonyction campanulatum, also known as the bell-flowered calonyction, is a species of flowering plant in the morning glory family, Convolvulaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of calonyction campanulatum include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues. Calonyction campanulatum is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
